Text.Page:
, I've been hearing your name over and over around here. Apparently you're the best new recruit we've got—no small task considering how many new recruits we have!

Seems like you deserve some federation bills.

Not quite sure how to use them? Go ahead and ask {@linkcreature:60#9000} in Lumbertown!

—Samael

You ? Hmm. Fair enough.

Commander Samael said this was for you.

You need to know how to use federation bills? Well, that's easy enough. You just exchange them for whatever item you want—provided the merchant accepts federation bills.
